svg.text: $ ros2 run jetson_ready_ros2_object_detection benchmark --backend torchvision --device cuda
backend=torchvision model=default device=cuda fps=12.84 latency_ms_mean=77.90 latency_ms_p95=84.35 detections=3
Fields: backend, model, device, FPS, mean latency, p95 latency, final-frame detection count
Numbers shown here are illustrative README sample output, not Jetson test claims.
Jetson-oriented, not yet tested on Jetson.
